title: Tug-of-War
body: Two teams of nine members each engage in a tug-of-war. Each member of the first team has an average mass of $$68$$ kg and exerts an average force of $$1350$$ N horizontally on the ground. Each member of the second team has an average mass of $$73$$ kg and exerts an average force of $$1365$$ N horizontally on the ground in the opposite direction.
